description: search Google Scholar (via the scholarly library) and export results as JSON
rules: read-only — results written to record_store as scholar.json
QUERY is a free-text Scholar query (supports author:, intitle:, source: operators)
LIMIT caps results (default 50); SORT_BY is relevance|citations
requires the third-party 'scholarly' Python library; absent it the core exits and the porter writes {}
porter degrades gracefully (writes {} and exits 0) when scholarly is missing or Scholar is unreachable
usage: Set QUERY. Optionally LIMIT, SORT_BY (relevance|citations). Output: scholar.json.
limitation: Needs the 'scholarly' library AND network access to scholar.google.com; heavily rate-limited and prone to blocking. Prefer search_pubmed for biomedical work.
